meaning: adj.通货膨胀的,通货膨胀倾向的
examples: Inflationary pressures continued to slacken last month.
Given high unemployment, inflationary problems, and slow growth in real earnings, a working wife can increase household income and relieve some of these pressing financial burdens.
The bank is worried about mounting inflationary pressures.
In the inflationary blowup of the late 1970s, diamonds were the subject of considerable investment fervor.
The stronger emerging currencies would also be inflationary, which would be positive for gold prices.
